title: More Menu
heading: District Magistrate & Collector Office
text:
# District Magistrate & Collector Office

The District Magistrate & Collector’s Office is situated at Office Lane which is the centre of Agartala city.Popularly known as the DM Complex to the local natives of West is in a serene place full of greenery.
